title: Over half the music uploaded to Deezer is now AI, and most of it is fraud
summary: Deezer said this week that AI songs made up more than 50% of its June uploads. Fully AI tracks make up just 1% to 3% of actual streams, Deezer says .
caption: output/2026-07-22/over-half-the-music-uploaded-to-deezer-is-now-ai-and-most-of-it-is-fra.txt
